name: vscode
description: Install Visual Studio Code with extensions for development.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$u = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Programs\Microsoft VS Code\Code.exe'; $s = 'C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft VS Code\\Code.exe'; $log = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\\verify\\vscode-verify.log'; $smoke = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\\smoke\\vscode-smoke.txt'; if ((Test-Path -LiteralPath $u) -or (Test-Path -LiteralPath $s)) { Set-Content -Path $log -Value 'VSCode installed successfully'; Set-Content -Path $smoke -Value 'vscode_ok' } else { 'VSCode executable not found (UserSetup or system path)' | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
